stemHtml: What do you understand by "aircraft security check"?

options.a: It is an inspection of those parts of the interior of the aircraft to which passengers may have had access, together with an inspection of the hold of the aircraft in order to detect prohibited articles and unlawful interferences with the aircraft.
options.b: It is an inspection of the interior and accessible exterior of the aircraft in order to detect prohibited articles and unlawful interferences that jeopardise the security of the aircraft.
options.c: It is an inspection done by a flight safety inspector who checks if airworthiness certificate of an aircraft is valid.
options.d: It is an inspection carried out before flight to ensure that the aircraft is fit for the intended flight.
